description: Initial-condition reference topics for FLAC setup. These topics help agents choose initialization commands and validation checks before solving.

items.name: stress-initialization
items.description: Uniform stresses, stress gradients, gravity-based stress initialization, and K0 ratio workflows.
items.common_use: Install in-situ stresses before excavation, support installation, or staged loading.

items.name: state-reset
items.description: Reset displacement, velocity, state variables, and model history after reaching initial equilibrium.
items.common_use: Prepare a clean construction-stage baseline after gravity or elastic initialization.

items.name: fluid-thermal
items.description: Initial pore pressure, saturation, fluid density, temperature, and thermal state setup.
